- TypeScript version: <!-- e.g. 5.4.5 -->

<!-- One sentence: what the library should have done. -->

```
<stack trace or error output>
```

## Minimal reproduction

<!-- The most valuable bug report includes a failing test or a tiny
     project that reproduces the issue. If you can write a failing
     test (the test files live in packages/<pkg>/tests/), paste it
     here. -->

```typescript
// minimal repro
```

## Additional context

<!-- Anything that might help: related issues, hypotheses about the
